title: pourretia ferruginea
intro: Pourretia ferruginea is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the iron-flowered pourretia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pourretia ferruginea include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Pourretia ferruginea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various forms of consumption and application in traditional medicine.
